title: DJI Lito 1 and X1 Leaks, Rumours, and Speculation - DrDrone.ca
description: The DJI Lito 1 and X1 are new sub-250g drones expected sometime between February and April 2026. They feature O5 transmission (20km+ range), 360° obstacle avoidance, and voice control. The Lito 1 is potentially geared towards beginners, while the X1 could offer 42GB storage and pro-level features for creators.
